ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "shirt_type" TEXT /* Type of shirt (e.g., T-shirt, Polo) */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "arm_length" INTEGER /* Arm length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_type" TEXT /* Type of sleeve (e.g., short, long, sleeveless) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size specification */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the clothing item (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the clothing item (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clothing item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clothing item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse or store where the inventory is located */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last physically checked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Customer's chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Customer's waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Customer's hips measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Customer's shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Customer's length measurement in inches */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size based on measurements */,
  "fit_type_preference" TEXT /* Preferred fit type (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "sleeve_type_preference" TEXT /* Preferred sleeve type (e.g., short, long, sleeveless) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)
